about.title: The essence of Plan B
about.intro: Plan B is a premium bar & lounge in Lloret de Mar, created for lovers of design, cocktails and high-quality social experiences.
about.p1: Our philosophy combines an immersive nightlife atmosphere with an author menu and attentive service. Every detail is designed to offer a distinguished experience.
about.p2: From ingredient selection to space design, we seek modern elegance and comfort to create memorable nights.
about.exteriorAlt: Plan B exterior in Lloret de Mar

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.description: Design, flavour and atmosphere come together in every detail for a premium experience.

values.title: Values
values.description: Quality, exclusivity, hospitality and contemporary European style.

premium.title: Premium atmosphere
premium.description: Spaces designed to enjoy the night in style. Soft lighting, noble materials and a layout that encourages conversation.

cocktails.title: Signature cocktails
cocktails.description: We use contemporary techniques and reinvented classics with select ingredients to create a unique drinks menu.

events.title: Events & World Cup 2026
events.intro: At Plan B, bar and pizzeria in Lloret de Mar, we broadcast all 2026 World Cup matches live. Book your table, order artisan pizza and enjoy football with premium cocktails and lounge atmosphere.

mundial-2026.title: World Cup 2026 — All matches live
mundial-2026.summary: At Plan B we broadcast all FIFA World Cup 2026 matches in Lloret de Mar. Live screens, artisan pizzas, signature cocktails and premium lounge atmosphere. Book your table and don't miss a single match.
